kept.text:
17100フォロワー到達(*´꒳`*)ﾉ

何やら定期的なスパム垢狩りで、フォロワーが減ってまた増えての反動で、ジャスト17100フォロワーをスクショできませんでした。
連休明けもあり、一気に50人ぐらい増えた感じです。

次の目標は17171フォロワーですかね。
個人的には、17500フォロワーも小さな目標です。理由は秘密。
今年の大きな目標は、17700フォロワー。
イーロン・マスクがTwitter を買収した時のフォロワー数が7700人だったので。買収から４年以内で10000人も増えたというのは、大きな区切りですし。

3000人のフォロワー増に6年10ヶ月弱もかかっていた時代を思えば、3年8か月で10000人も増えること自体が、とんでもないことで。
おそらくは前経営陣によってシャドウバンされていた時代がなければ、今頃は3万人を超えていたかもしれず。
ただ、雌伏の時代があったからこそ、質の高いフォロワーが増えた面も。

これからもマイペースで、ぼちぼちと書きますm(_ _)m

kept.text:
継続は、想像を絶するほど過酷だ

私はもう4年以上、SNSで配信を続けている

このアカウントが何個目なのか、もう数えるのも馬鹿らしくなった

普通の人間なら、一度バーンアウトするかアカウント凍結された時点で終わりだ

それでも俺は止めない

勘違いしている人間が多いから言うが

なぜこんなに長く続けているのか？

そんなの100%自分のためだ

100%自分の徳を積み、圧倒的な豊かさを掴み取るためだ

配信でも伝えたが、今の社会やこれからの未来ではSNSのフォロワーは資産になるんだよ

実際に、面接ではフォロワーが1万人というだけで採用する企業は無数にある
SNSっていうのは、それだけで人生が変わるものの一つに昇華しているんだよ

だけどそんな事を教えてくれる人なんてほぼいないだろう

だから私が言葉を選ばすに教えてあげるが、これからの未来はフォロワーは金だ
、貴方の経済的基盤に直結するものになるんだよ

その認識を持っている者がこれからの社会では成功する

そうやって、この狂気じみた執念が、奇跡を呼び寄せる

だから今、私とみなさんの間に存在する圧倒的な経済格差は、当然の結果だ

本気で圧倒的な豊かさを手に入れたいなら、
貴方も覚悟を決めて配信を始めろ

そして、私と同じように、愚直に徳を積み重ね続けろ

覚悟がある者だけが、頂点に立てる

DUemqeaQndxYSgTkpkK1TJ16fmTgzdBTjtj67A6xpump

Look at the dev follows who is claiming on the coin

quoted_tweet.text:
Welcome to Hudson Williams Online! We are HWU admins (without the owner). Please see our statement below on recent events and how we plan to move forward into a healthier and improved space.

We are looking forward to growing this account, and most importantly, watching Hudson’s career flourish. The 3 of us have a lot of respect, love, and care for one another, with no need for hierarchy, which will prevent historical issues from happening again.

If you have any further questions, we will try and answer some of them before we begin updating again. Please be gentle and kind to each other. We hope you will support us and allow us the opportunity to build your trust in us again.

profile_bio.description: Your #1 source for all content about director, screenwriter and actor Hudson Williams ✩ Turn our notifications on to stay up to date!

media.ext_alt_text:
Hi everyone – the following will address HWU, the creation of Hudson Williams Online, & how we, as former HWU admins, intend to move forward 🤍

For full transparency, we have been trying to come to an agreement with the main owner of HWU for days now to allow us to continue running the accounts independently. Unfortunately, we have been unable to reach an agreement, & we are completely locked out of the account, with no way of accessing it, so have made the decision to start again. We deeply wish that it didn’t come to this.

We want to apologize, genuinely, to anyone who had ever been slighted by HWU in the past, publicly or privately. Our deepest regret was not standing up for those targeted, out of cowardly fear of losing the accounts. We hope you can understand that our fears were warranted.

Please give us the chance to clarify a few things. Whether you believe what we say or not is your choice.

Disclaimer: This message comes from the 3 admins that were not the owner of HWU.

From late December / early January until this week, HWU was a team of 4.

The original admin emphasized it was in her purview as the owner and “manager” of the account to handle the direct communications with the fans in replies, with media outlets who contacted us, with Hudson’s collaborators, etc. We had very limited control in how we were allowed to communicate, outside of regularly updating.

However, once we joined in late 2025/early 2026, the 3 of us did a majority of the updating. The account would not have grown over 200K followers across 3 social media platforms without the hard work and dedication that we put into it.

The 3 of us have departed from HWU and have decided to create Hudson Williams Online; two of us are based in North America and one in Europe.

We deeply, deeply love updating on Hudson, this community, and would love the opportunity to start over with you all with this new account.

This message comes from the 3 admins that were not the owner of HWU.

HWU’S DEACTIVATIONS

We were fully blindsided both times. This second time, only one admin, apart from the owner, was awake when the account was deactivated. The other two admins woke up hours later, while the admin who was awake attempted to reason with the owner and get the account back online. We did not agree with this rash decision, nor with the first deactivation either, and felt extremely frustrated and heartbroken that both deactivations happened at monumental points of Hudsons’ career.

We want to make it clear that we will never deactivate this account. If for some reason we were to quit, we still wouldn’t deactivate. We hope to build a page that is a beautiful collection of Hudson’s career. We are uncertain with HWU’s fate and whether it will remain inactive, but we are glad that an archive is there.

This message comes from the 3 admins that were not the owner of HWU.

THE MESSAGES

Those types of messages were never sent in our communications historically – they were primarily about updates and who was busy/available. We find the content of them disgustingly misogynistic and homophobic. As a team, we typically avoided discussing Hudson’s private life, and want to emphasize the importance of respecting his boundaries.

We will not allow any shady, hateful comment towards Hudson, his loved ones, including family and friends, peers, coworkers or employers, to fester in HWO’s replies.

This message comes from the 3 admins that were not the owner of HWU.

tweet.text:
@noruma_noel 某サイト情報ではPremiumは1000いいね/日のようです
のるまさんは投稿も積極的にされているので人間判定されると思いますよ😄
Like limits are roughly:
Free accounts: ~500 likes/day, with a soft cap of ~50/hour
Premium accounts: ~1,000 likes/day
Retweets: ~300/day for free, ~500 for Premium
Rapid-fire liking (scrolling through a feed and tapping the heart on every post) is one of the fastest ways to hit rate limits.
